overall.description: Static first-person view from a cyberpunk apartment bedroom overlooking a rainy, neon-lit cityscape at night. The scene features high-end game engine graphics with atmospheric lighting, messy bed sheets in the foreground, and a large panoramic window revealing the futuristic urban environment outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: stationary in bedroom, looking out at the rainy cityscape through the window

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling window showing rainy cityscape with neon lights and atmospheric fog
unmade bed with rumpled white and grey sheets in the immediate foreground
dark wall with geometric black and grey tile pattern
white contemporary sofa positioned against the left wall
warm rectangular overhead light fixture recessed into the ceiling
blue and orange neon lights from distant buildings visible through the rain-streaked glass

segments.scene_description: A static view from a first-person perspective inside a modern cyberpunk apartment bedroom. The camera overlooks a rainy, neon-lit cityscape through a large panoramic window, with messy bed sheets visible in the foreground and contemporary furniture arranged against dark tiled walls. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric, with mixed lighting from interior fixtures and exterior neon glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a moody cyberpunk bedroom that emphasizes the contrast between a cluttered interior and a sprawling neon metropolis. It begins with a view of messy bed sheets in the immediate foreground, grounding the observer in a lived-in, contemporary space. The gaze then extends across the room, where modern furniture is arranged against dark tiled walls under a blend of dim interior fixtures and external light. Finally, the perspective opens up to a large panoramic window, revealing a rainy, futuristic cityscape illuminated by a vibrant, atmospheric neon glow.
